understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels by moving selectable pieces to position pushable objects onto goal tiles marked as '+', satisfying the win condition for each level until the entire game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the selected piece by one cell in the specified direction, potentially pushing adjacent pushable objects if they are in the way; walls block movement and prevent shifts; selection is done via CLICK to switch to another selectable piece at a target position, though it may not always succeed if blocked or invalid.
